narrative:
Liberty Twp township has 4,921 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.2 percentage points.
